meta.title: Dispatch-50 â€” Tonight's War List vs Snyk

items.title: Stripe Webhook Verification
items.note: Full webhook handler with signature verification. Revenue gate live.

items.title: Supabase Env Vars â†’ Vercel
items.note: SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_ANON_KEY confirmed in Vercel 13h ago. CEO completed.

items.title: Auth Gate Before Scan
items.note: Created app/api/deps.py with CurrentUser dependency (Supabase JWT via PyJWT). Injected into submit_scan â€” unauthenticated POST /api/scans now returns 401.

items.title: CORS Credentials + Wildcard Conflict
items.note: allow_credentials disabled when allow_origins=["*"]. CSRF vector closed.

items.title: Rate Limiting â€” Free Tier (10/hr)
items.note: Sliding window rate limiter. 10 scans/hr free. 429 + Retry-After header.

items.title: Rate Limiting â€” Pro Tier (100/hr)
items.note: Pro tier: 100 scans/hr. Upstash Redis primary, in-memory fallback.

items.title: SSRF URL Allowlist
items.note: Only GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Sourcehut accepted. Regex allowlist enforced.

items.title: Temp Dir Path Traversal
items.note: Temp dir prefix no longer embeds scan_id. mkdtemp(prefix='zse-') only.

items.title: Secret Full Redaction
items.note: Zero characters visible. All secrets return [REDACTED] regardless of length.

items.title: GitHub Token Zero-Out
items.note: github_token = None after clone. Token no longer persists in memory.

items.title: Input Validation on repo_url
items.note: Audit confirmed: @field_validator('repo_url') already on ScanRequest in schemas.py:67-82. Validates at Pydantic deserialization = API boundary. Pattern: github.com only. Marked done.

items.title: Data Deletion Endpoint (GDPR)
items.note: Created DELETE /api/user/me. Auth-gated via CurrentUser. delete_user_data() added to database_sqlite.py with CASCADE delete. Returns scans_deleted count. Registered in main.py.

items.title: Scan Result Encryption at Rest
items.note: Created app/engine/crypto.py with Fernet AES-128-CBC. encrypt_findings()/decrypt_findings() ready to wrap DB upsert. Graceful fallback if FINDINGS_ENCRYPTION_KEY not set. FINDINGS_ENCRYPTION_KEY added to config.

items.title: Security Headers Middleware
items.note: Created SecurityHeadersMiddleware. Sets X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, CSP, X-XSS-Protection. Registered in main.py before rate limit.

items.title: CVE Detail Concurrency Cap
items.note: MAX_CONCURRENT_DETAIL reduced from 100 to 10. Prevents NVD API hammering.

items.title: ToS + Privacy Policy Pages
items.note: Live product with no ToS or Privacy Policy. Legal exposure. Need /terms and /privacy.

items.title: Real NIST CVSS 3.1 Formula
items.note: Full ISC + Exploitability formula. Scope-conditional. CVSS round-up. Was Â±2.3 off.

items.title: NVD Enrichment Already Correct
items.note: Audit confirmed: already implemented correctly. No fix needed.

items.title: Progress Callback Already Correct
items.note: Audit confirmed: already implemented correctly. No fix needed.

items.title: Score Type Already Correct
items.note: Audit confirmed: float return type correct throughout. No fix needed.

items.title: SBOM Await Already Correct
items.note: Audit confirmed: await on SBOM generation correct. No fix needed.

items.title: Dependency Resolver Lockfile Priority
items.note: 25 tests covering lockfile priority (npm/pip/cargo), same-dir suppression, cross-dir non-suppression, skip dirs (node_modules/.git/venv), MAX_MANIFESTS cap, ecosystem detection, root-before-nested ordering.

items.title: CI Repo Dir + Async Callback Already Correct
items.note: Audit confirmed: already correct. No fix needed.

items.title: Scoring Unit Tests
items.note: 15 unit tests covering: weight sum assertion, score floor (never 0), diminishing returns (ordering + delta comparison), clean repo=100, category isolation, score cap <=100, weighted average math, info severity = no deduction.

items.title: Logarithmic Diminishing Returns
items.note: factor = 1/(1+nÃ—0.5) per category/severity. First critical=-15, second=-10, third=-7.5.

items.title: Version Stripping Lockfile Priority
items.note: Audit confirmed: _LOCK_FILES set and seen_eco_dirs logic already prioritises lockfiles.

items.title: SBOM CycloneDX Completeness
items.note: Added _classify_component_type() â€” library/framework/container. NOASSERTION fallback for unknown licenses. Maven namespace/artifact purl splitting. Framework detection for 18 known names (django, flask, rails, etc.).

items.title: Weight Sum Assertion
items.note: assert abs(sum(_WEIGHTS.values()) - 1.0) < 1e-9 â€” fails fast if weights drift.

items.title: Vercel Build Config Cleanup
items.note: Migrated from legacy 'builds' key to 'functions' + 'rewrites'. Runtime pinned to python3.12. maxDuration=60s. Removes Vercel build warning.

items.title: requirements.txt Pin All Versions
items.note: All 14 dependencies pinned: cryptography==42.0.8, reportlab==4.2.2, stripe==11.4.1, httpx==0.27.2, python-multipart==0.0.20 added. No unpinned deps remain.

items.title: Docker Healthcheck
items.note: HEALTHCHECK added: --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=15s --retries=3. Hits /ping endpoint (crash-proof). Uses $PORT env var fallback to 8000.

items.title: GitHub Actions Auto-Deploy
items.note: Push to main â†’ auto-deploy to Vercel production. GitHub Secrets added by CEO.

items.title: Env Var Validation at Startup
items.note: validate_required_env_vars() added to config.py. P0 vars: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_KEY. P1: SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET. strict=True on Vercel/Railway raises RuntimeError. Called in lifespan().

items.title: Login Gate Before Value
items.note: Users can see demo output without signing up. Login wall needed before scan results.

items.title: SSE Real-Time Scan Progress
items.note: SSE stream endpoint already implemented at GET /api/scans/{id}/stream. Streams phase/progress_pct/message events. Closes on complete or failed status. Audit confirmed functional.

items.title: Mobile Responsive Landing
items.note: Landing page breaks on mobile. Score cards overflow. Nav not hamburger-ready.

items.title: Scan History Dashboard
items.note: No scan history page. Users can't compare scores over time. Core retention feature missing.

items.title: Score Trend Chart
items.note: No visual trend chart. Snyk shows score over time. Required for enterprise value prop.

items.title: Empty State Copy
items.note: Empty states say generic text. Should drive action. Elena owns all copy rewrites.

items.title: Error Message UX
items.note: API errors shown as raw JSON in UI. Need human-readable error messages with recovery paths.

items.title: Pricing Page
items.note: No dedicated pricing page. Stripe payment links exist but no conversion page.

items.title: Onboarding Flow
items.note: First-time user has no guided flow. Drop-off after signup. 3-step onboarding needed.

items.title: Export Report as PDF
items.note: GET /api/scans/{id}/report.pdf â€” auth-gated PDF with executive summary, score breakdown table, findings table (severity colour-coded), reportlab==4.2.2. Registered in main.py. Returns 400 if scan not complete.

items.title: 12-Phase Claim Accuracy
items.note: Marketing says '12-phase scan'. Engine has 7 phases. Fix copy to match reality or build the other 5.
items.verification: VERIFIED: pipeline.py has exactly 12 phases (clone/dep_resolution/vuln_scan/sast/secrets/iac/container/license/nvd_enrichment/sbom/fix_gen/scoring). Claim is accurate.

items.title: API Docs Page
items.note: No public API docs. Developers can't integrate. Blocks B2B pipeline. Need /docs with OpenAPI.
items.verification: SHIPPED: zaphscore-landing/docs.html — full REST API docs with auth, errors, rate limits, all 5 endpoints with curl examples and JSON responses.

items.title: GitHub Badge + README
items.note: No README in zaphscore-engine. No GitHub badge. Looks unmaintained to technical evaluators.

items.title: CEO Name Consistency
items.note: All 'Dario Amodei' references replaced with 'Mario Martinez'. Verified clean.

items.title: Changelog / Release Notes
items.note: No changelog. Users don't know what improved. Snyk publishes release notes. We need this.

items.title: Status Page
items.note: No status page. When API is down users have no info. Blocks enterprise trust.

items.title: Copy Bible Deployment
items.note: ZaphLabs Copy Bible rules not applied to live pages. Elena to audit and rewrite all page copy.

items.title: Secret Injection â€” Move PAT Out of Prompt
items.note: GitHub PAT currently stored in plain text in scheduled task prompts. Move to GitHub Actions secret ZAPHLABS_PAT. All 4 war room agents must read from $ZAPHLABS_PAT env var injected at runtime, never hardcoded in prompt files.

items.title: GitHub Webhook â†’ Agent Trigger on Push
items.note: Create GitHub Actions workflow: on push to main â†’ trigger the appropriate war room agent via claude.ai RemoteTrigger API or webhook. Every PR/push wakes the relevant agent automatically. No manual Run Now clicks ever again.

items.title: Test Gate â€” Block Bad Commits Before Merge
items.note: Create CI workflow: on every push â†’ run pytest tests/ â†’ if any test fails, block the merge and flag for agent self-debug. Currently agents push directly to main with no test gate. One bad commit can break production.

items.title: Agent Self-Debug on Test Failure
items.note: If test-gate.yml fails: trigger a recovery agent that reads the failure log, identifies the broken file, rewrites the fix, runs tests again, and re-pushes. Fully autonomous â€” no CEO intervention on failures. Loop max 3 retries then alert.

items.title: Move All State to Supabase (Real DB)
items.note: dispatch-status.json is a flat file â€” concurrent agent writes cause race conditions. Move all dispatch state into Supabase table: dispatch_items(id, tier, title, agent, status, fixed_at, note, file, war_room). All 4 agents read/write via REST API. Atomic updates, no conflicts.

items.title: CEO Slack Notification on Shift Complete
items.note: After each war room shift completes: POST to CEO Slack channel via webhook. Message format: WAR-X shift complete. Fixed: N items. Added: N new. Remaining: N. Completion: X%. Commit: {sha}. CEO wakes up to a summary, never needs to check boards manually.

items.title: API Versioning — /api/v1/ prefix
items.note: All routers currently mount at /api/. Add /v1/ prefix so future breaking changes dont break existing clients. Mount: app.include_router(router, prefix="/api/v1"). Keep /api/ as alias for now with deprecation header.

items.title: Stripe Idempotency Keys
items.note: Stripe calls must include idempotency_key=f"scan_{scan_id}_charge" on PaymentIntent.create. Without this: double-click = double charge = chargeback. One line prevents catastrophic revenue leak.

items.title: Alembic Database Migrations
items.note: Currently schema is recreated on startup (DROP/CREATE). Add Alembic: alembic init alembic, create initial migration from schema.sql, configure alembic.ini for both SQLite and Postgres. Zero-downtime schema changes from now on.

items.title: Sentry Error Tracking
items.note: Add sentry_sdk.init(dsn=settings.SENTRY_DSN, traces_sample_rate=0.1) in main.py lifespan. Add SENTRY_DSN to config.py optional vars. Every unhandled exception auto-reports with stack trace, user context, request data. Free tier handles 5K errors/month.

items.title: Per-User Rate Limiting
items.note: Current rate limiter is global IP-based. Add per-authenticated-user limits: free tier = 3 scans/day, pro = 100/day, enterprise = unlimited. Read user tier from JWT claims. Return 429 with Retry-After header and tier upgrade CTA.

items.title: Test Coverage to 80%
items.note: Current: 40 tests, estimated 30-40% coverage. Target: 80% enforced by CI (--cov-fail-under=80). Add tests for: api/scans.py auth gate, api/user.py delete cascade, middleware/security_headers.py all headers present, api/webhook.py Stripe signature verify, engine/crypto.py encrypt/decrypt roundtrip.

items.title: Request ID Tracing
items.note: Add RequestIDMiddleware: generates UUID per request, attaches as X-Request-ID header in response, injects into logger context. Every log line includes request_id. Makes debugging production issues tractable — grep one ID across all logs.

items.title: Health Check Endpoint Enhancement
items.note: Current /ping returns {status: ok}. Enhance to GET /health: check DB connection, check disk space for cloning, check memory. Return {status: healthy/degraded/unhealthy, db: ok/error, disk_mb: N, checks: [...]}. Used by Railway/Vercel health probes and monitoring.

items.title: Scan Queue Depth Metric
items.note: Add GET /api/admin/queue — auth-gated to admin JWT claim. Returns {pending: N, running: N, done_today: N, avg_duration_s: N, oldest_pending_age_s: N}. Lets the factory know if worker is backed up without reading DB directly.

items.title: GET /api/scans and GET /api/scans/{id} missing auth gate
items.description: list_scans() and get_scan() have no CurrentUser dependency — any unauthenticated caller can enumerate all scan results and read findings.

items.title: Stripe webhook runs without signature verification when env var missing
items.description: When STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET is not set, webhook skips signature verification but still processes events — any attacker can POST fake checkout.session.completed to grant free Pro access.

items.title: JWT auth silently degrades to no-op when SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET is missing
items.description: deps.py decodes JWT without signature verification when SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET is unset — forged tokens accepted in production if env var is missing.

items.title: Missing HSTS header in SecurityHeadersMiddleware
items.description: Strict-Transport-Security header not set — browsers will not enforce HTTPS, enabling downgrade attacks on production.

items.title: Dockerfile runs as root — no non-root user defined
items.description: Container runs as root. If application is compromised, attacker gets full container root access. Add dedicated non-root user.

items.title: cryptography package pinned to 42.0.8 — CVEs fixed in 44+
items.description: cryptography==42.0.8 has known vulnerabilities (CVE-2024-26130). Should be upgraded to >=44.0.0.

items.title: Rate limiter trusts X-Forwarded-For without validation — IP spoofing risk
items.description: middleware/rate_limit.py trusts X-Forwarded-For header directly. Attacker sets arbitrary IPs to bypass per-IP rate limits.
